title: Create: 30 Day Build Challenge
description: This modpack features a world with 30 plots for you to take on the 30 day Create mod build challenge!
body:
This modpack features a world with 30 plots for you to take on the 30 day Create mod build challenge! It also comes with all the mods you will need to record yourself as you build your world. Here are 30 build prompts to get you started, feel free to interpret them as you would like!

[![Get your next Minecraft server with Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/11b7b3dc-ff6a-4dae-840f-e5077035a295.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/SCHEMATIC)

![30 Day Create Mod Build Challenge](https://createmod.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/uberswes_30_day_create_mod_build_challenge.png)

Share Your Builds!
------------------

I would love to see what you create during this challenge. Share your builds via [CreateMod.com](https://createmod.com/) or [Schematicannon.com](https://www.schematicannon.com/) with the tag "30 Day Challenge". You can also post them on my Discord, join via this link: [https://discord.gg/NQJuhb6stv](https://discord.gg/NQJuhb6stv "https://discord.gg/NQJuhb6stv")  
  
I am also looking to feature some of your builds in my upcoming videos, please make sure the builds conform to the following rules.

*   Stay within the 25x25 area for each build
*   There is no limit on how high or low you can go
*   Keep it to as few mods as possible
*   Use one of the prompts listed above

Other uses for the map
----------------------

The map was made for this challenge which I am doing in creative mode however you are free to use the map in any way you would like! You can use it for survival to build your base or anything else you can think of, feel free to use your imagination. If you find an interesting use of the modpack I would love to hear about it!
